title: Daily Memo: Trump on Cuba, Pakistani Airstrikes
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Plans for Cuba. U.S. President Donald Trump said he thinks he will have “the honor of taking Cuba,” amid the United States’ continued energy blockade of the island nation. Speaking to reporters on Monday, he called Cuba “a very weakened country.” Trump recently suggested he would turn his attention to Cuba after the U.S. achieves […]

Plans for Cuba. U.S. President Donald Trump said he thinks he will have “the honor of taking Cuba,” amid the United States’ continued energy blockade of the island nation.
